mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_MEMBER_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO MEMBER ( MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_PW, MEMBER_NAME, NICKNAME, EMAIL, PHONE, PROFILE_IMAGE, ROLE, STATUS, ADULT_VERIFIED, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{memberNo}, #{memberId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberPw, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nickname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{profileImage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{role, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adultVerified, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, NULL )
INSERT INTO MEMBER_PLATFORM ( MEMBER_PLATFORM_NO, MEMBER_NO, PLATFORM_NO, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_MEMBER_PLATFORM_NO.NEXTVAL, #{memberNo}, #{platformNo}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_PW, MEMBER_NAME, NICKNAME, EMAIL, PHONE, PROFILE_IMAGE, ROLE, STATUS, ADULT_VERIFIED, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND MEMBER_PW = #{memberPw} AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT PLATFORM_NO FROM OTT_PLATFORM WHERE UPPER(TRIM(PLATFORM_CODE)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{platformCode}))
